summary: A nighttime field video, posted by the DHS official, recorded during what the narration describes as an early-morning ICE operation. A bearded man in a gray polo shirt bearing a Department of Homeland Security seal and a tactical vest speaks to a handheld microphone on a residential street; behind him are parked vehicles with red emergency lights and other figures, one in a high-visibility vest. The clip carries Fox News Digital branding in the corner and burned-in white captions tracking his spoken remarks about ICE officers working to remove criminal illegal aliens and protect neighborhoods. The audio is spoken word over a light music bed.

script.scene: A bearded man in a gray DHS-seal polo and a vest speaks into a handheld mic on a dark street; a parked car and a person in a high-visibility vest are behind him under red emergency lights. Caption: 'EARLY'. Fox News Digital logo upper right.
Same setting, the man gesturing as he speaks to camera. Caption: 'TO GET'.
Same setting, the man continuing his remarks with an open hand. Caption: 'NEIGHBORHOODS'.
